compiled_state.title: Convert model selection prose to decision table, merge Quick Reference and Error Recovery
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Convert sub-agent model selection logic in Phase 5 of plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md into a markdown decision table with columns: parent_story_complex, task_model, task_class, action. Merge Quick Reference and Error Recovery tables into a single 'Reference & Recovery' section with (1) Phase Overview subsection and (2) Error Situations subsection. No phase descriptions duplicated.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Model selection expressed as decision table with 4 columns: parent_story_complex, task_model, task_class, action
- Same logical decisions preserved (no behavior change)
- Quick Reference and Error Recovery merged into single 'Reference & Recovery' section
- Phase Overview subsection present
- Error Situations subsection present
- No phase descriptions duplicated between merged section and phase bodies
- bash tests/run-all.sh passes with 0 failures

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (edit)
